section_name: Road warning signals for tow vehicles or wreckers
text: The Oregon Transportation Commission shall prescribe warning signs or signals for placement on roadways by tow vehicles or wreckers under ORS 822.220 (Authorization to obstruct traffic) . [1983 c.338 §449; 1985 c.16 §236; 1987 c.119 §2]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 815. Vehicle Equip. Generally
##### § 815.070 — Road warning signals for tow vehicles or wreckers

The Oregon Transportation Commission shall prescribe warning signs or signals for placement on roadways by tow vehicles or wreckers under ORS 822.220 (Authorization to obstruct traffic) . [1983 c.338 §449; 1985 c.16 §236; 1987 c.119 §2]

subsections.text: The Oregon Transportation Commission shall prescribe warning signs or signals for placement on roadways by tow vehicles or wreckers under ORS 822.220 (Authorization to obstruct traffic) . [1983 c.338 §449; 1985 c.16 §236; 1987 c.119 §2]
